summary: Iteration 13 Testing Complete - Backend refactoring validated. All modular routes (auth, articles, properties, procedures, admin, messages) working correctly. API v3 confirmed. Messaging system (WebSocket + REST) functional. UI features tested: online indicator, message icon visibility, contact buttons, admin dashboard.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/ returns 'Matrix News API v3' - Confirms refactored backend running
POST /api/auth/register creates visiteur - 200 OK with role='visiteur'
POST /api/auth/register with auteur role - Creates pending user (role=visiteur, status=pending)
POST /api/conversations creates new conversation between users
frontend_ui_tests: Homepage loads correctly with header, logo, category nav, immobilier/procedures links
Login page works - Admin login successful with role badge displayed
Profile page loads with user info and 'ADMIN' badge
Online indicator (green dot) visible on avatar in header [data-testid='online-indicator']
Admin notification bell visible in header [data-testid='admin-notification-bell']
Message icon NOT visible on homepage (correct behavior)
Property detail page shows 'Envoyer un message' button [data-testid='contact-agent-btn']
Procedure detail page shows 'Poser une question' button [data-testid='contact-admin-btn']
Admin database page loads with all tabs (DEMANDES, UTILISATEURS, ARTICLES, ANNONCES, PAIEMENTS)
Admin stats visible: 15 Users, 2 Articles, 2 Properties, 3 Payments
Role approval queue shows pending requests with Approve/Reject buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Backend successfully refactored into modular structure: routes/, models/, middleware/
All routers properly prefixed and registered in server.py
Auth middleware correctly handles JWT validation and user lookup
WebSocket messaging endpoint properly validates tokens
Online status tracking via ConnectionManager class
Message icon visibility correctly conditional on route path
Contact buttons properly conditional on user ownership
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing (auteur_*, convtest_*, viewer* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully refactored into modular structure. Key files: server.py (slim entry), routes/ (all endpoints), models/ (Pydantic models), middleware/auth.py (JWT auth). Messaging uses WebSocket at /api/ws/chat?token=XXX plus REST endpoints at /api/conversations. Online indicator uses green dot on avatar. Message icon only shows on /immobilier/* and /procedures/* routes. Contact buttons: 'Envoyer un message' on property detail, 'Poser une question' on procedure detail.
